title: 刀片 —— 钩子(复购耗材)

description.en: Sell replacement blades at high margin to customers who already own a Gillette razor. The blade pattern is patent-protected so only Gillette blades fit Gillette razors. Recurring revenue at high gross margin — this is where the entire business makes its money.
description.zh: 向已经拥有吉列剃须刀的客户高价出售替换刀片。刀片接口由专利保护,只有吉列刀片能装在吉列剃须刀上。复购收入 + 高毛利 —— 整个生意的钱都在这里。
